title: Medical Illustrator
description:
About the Company
Anatomage, Inc. develops advanced 3D medical visualization technology. BioDigital, a division of Anatomage, operates a leading cloud platform for interactive anatomy, conditions, and procedures used by patients, educators, and healthcare professionals worldwide.


About the Role
Anatomage is seeking a Medical Illustrator / Science Lead contractor with strong medical illustration and immersive media experience to lead the scientific direction of active healthcare education projects from scoping through final delivery.


Responsibilities

  • Own scientific direction across procedural training, mixed reality, multi-user, and web-based anatomy education projects
  • Guide cross-functional teams while ensuring scientific accuracy, clinical relevance, and production feasibility
  • Support clients including medical device companies, surgical training programs, and pharmaceutical brands
  • Lead projects from early scoping through final delivery across immersive healthcare experiences
  • Collaborate with production teams on medically accurate visual storytelling and education content


Requirements

  • Strong background in medical illustration and immersive media production
  • Experience leading scientific direction on healthcare education or visualization projects
  • Ability to ensure clinical accuracy and production feasibility across deliverables
  • Portfolio demonstrating medical illustration and immersive education work
  • Availability for a part-time contract engagement


Location
Remote.
skills: Medical illustration,Immersive media,Scientific accuracy,Clinical visualization,Project leadership

title: Illustrators
description:
About the Company
Anemative is a game development studio creating an anime-inspired mobile cricket game with a strong visual identity and player-focused UI.


About the Role
Anemative is hiring a creative Illustration and Game UI Artist to design game UI screens, HUDs, menus, icons, and anime-inspired visual assets for a mobile cricket title.


Responsibilities

  • Design game UI screens, HUDs, menus, and interactive buttons
  • Create UI concepts through sketches and illustrations
  • Design icons, rewards, profile screens, and in-game interfaces
  • Produce anime-inspired visual assets aligned with the game's art direction
  • Collaborate closely with game designers and developers on implementation


Requirements

  • Strong illustration and game UI design skills
  • Experience creating polished interface and HUD systems for games
  • Ability to deliver anime-inspired visual assets with consistent style
  • Comfort collaborating with design and development teams in a remote workflow
  • Portfolio demonstrating UI and illustration work for games or interactive products


Location
Remote.
skills: Game UI design,Illustration,Icon design,HUD design,Visual concepting

title: Illustrators
description:
About the Company
Hovercraft is a creative studio producing high-profile design and illustration for leading brands across campaigns, story-driven environments, immersive digital installations, and browser-based experiences.


About the Role
Hovercraft is seeking a freelance Designer-Illustrator to originate bold concepts within brand systems and deliver polished design and illustration from concept through final handoff.


Responsibilities

  • Take ideas from concept through final handoff with creatives, technologists, producers, and leadership
  • Develop original design directions and refine work within established brand guidelines
  • Combine conceptual thinking with strong craft and attention to detail
  • Adapt to different brand styles and spot opportunities for interactive or animation outputs
  • Bring outside inspiration and new thinking into the studio


Requirements

  • 5+ years of experience in a similar design or illustration role
  • Proficiency in Figma and/or Adobe Creative Cloud
  • Strong conceptual thinking with excellent craft and execution
  • Ability to work independently and within cross-disciplinary teams
  • Portfolio demonstrating brand design and illustration work


Compensation
$60+ per hour (freelance, remote United States).


Location
Remote.

title: Medical Illustrator
description:
About the Company
BioRender is the world's leading visual science communication platform, used by over a million scientists to create figures, presentations, and visual content that advances research.


About the Role
BioRender is building a dedicated team of formally trained medical illustrators and animators to serve as subject matter experts on scientific visual communication across product, marketing, sales, and education.


Responsibilities

  • Set the quality standard for how science is represented across BioRender products and content
  • Think critically about how science is represented visually and contribute to product and design decisions
  • Work across animation, demos, and visual systems with direct impact on multiple teams
  • Support marketing, sales, and education with scientifically accurate visual communication
  • Help define a new function at a high-growth science visualization company


Requirements

  • Formal training in medical illustration, biomedical visualization, or equivalent
  • Strong portfolio demonstrating static illustration and motion graphics skills
  • Deep understanding of anatomy, molecular biology, and scientific visual communication
  • Ability to think critically about scientific accuracy in visual products
  • Eligible to work remotely in the United States or Canada


Location
Remote (United States or Canada).

title: Senior Illustrator
description:
About the Company
Function Health is the AI operating system for health, helping members understand, measure, and improve their health through advanced diagnostics, biomarker testing, and AI-enabled insights. The company is venture-backed and recognized as one of Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies of 2024.


About the Role
Function Health is hiring a Senior Brand Designer (Illustrator) to shape durable creative systems, storytelling, and brand experiences as the company scales its next chapter of growth.


Responsibilities

  • Build and evolve brand illustration systems that support Function's health storytelling
  • Create compelling visual narratives across marketing, product, and brand touchpoints
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams in a fast-moving, mission-driven environment
  • Develop illustration and design work that helps define modern proactive health
  • Maintain high craft standards across scalable brand creative systems


Requirements

  • Strong background in brand design with deep illustration capability
  • Portfolio demonstrating systems thinking and high-quality brand storytelling
  • Ability to thrive in a fast-paced startup environment
  • Excellent collaboration and communication skills across teams
  • Passion for health, science, and mission-driven creative work


Location
Remote (United States).
skills: Brand illustration,Visual storytelling,Creative systems,Cross-functional collaboration,Portfolio development

title: Illustrators
description:
About the Company
Remote VA connects businesses with skilled virtual assistants and creative professionals, including e-commerce design specialists supporting Amazon listing optimization.


About the Role
Remote VA is hiring an Amazon Listing Designer / Graphic Designer with advanced Adobe Illustrator skills to create high-quality, print-ready graphics for Amazon product listings and custom merchandise.


Responsibilities

  • Design and produce high-quality graphics for Amazon product listings and custom merchandise
  • Create posters, banners, yard signs, infographics, and listing visuals using Adobe Illustrator
  • Deliver print-ready, production-quality artwork aligned with e-commerce requirements
  • Collaborate with e-commerce clients on conversion-focused listing visuals
  • Meet daily production goals in a fully remote workflow


Requirements

  • 2–5+ years of professional graphic design experience with commercial and print production focus
  • Advanced proficiency in Adobe Illustrator for vector-based design
  • Experience designing for Amazon product listings preferred
  • Strong attention to detail and ability to meet production deadlines
  • Portfolio showcasing commercial design and e-commerce listing work


Location
Remote.
skills: Adobe Illustrator,Amazon listing design,Print production,Vector graphics,E-commerce visuals

title: Brand Designer
description:
About the Company
Hightouch is an Agentic Marketing Platform powered by a Composable CDP, helping marketing teams analyze performance, brainstorm ideas, and generate on-brand creative. Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Customer Data Platforms.


About the Role
Hightouch is hiring a Brand Designer to help define and evolve the company's visual identity and marketing creative across a fast-growing agentic marketing platform.


Responsibilities

  • Shape Hightouch's brand identity across marketing, product, and growth touchpoints
  • Create high-quality brand and marketing design assets for campaigns and communications
  • Collaborate with marketing, product, and leadership on brand systems and storytelling
  • Maintain consistency and craft across evolving product and GTM needs
  • Contribute to a culture focused on velocity, quality, and customer impact


Requirements

  • Strong brand design portfolio with systems thinking
  • Experience creating marketing and brand assets for technology companies
  • Excellent visual craft and ability to work across channels
  • Comfort operating in a fast-paced, remote startup environment
  • Based in North America for remote collaboration


Compensation
$140,000 – $180,000 per year (remote North America).


Location
Remote.

title: Brand Designer
description:
About the Company
WorkOS builds modern developer tools and APIs that make it easy for companies to add enterprise-ready features such as SSO, directory sync, and audit logs to their applications.


About the Role
WorkOS is hiring a Brand Designer focused on web to shape the company's visual identity, marketing website, and brand storytelling for a developer-first audience.


Responsibilities

  • Design and evolve WorkOS brand and web experiences across marketing properties
  • Create compelling visual systems that communicate complex developer products clearly
  • Collaborate with marketing, product, and engineering on brand and web initiatives
  • Maintain high craft standards across web, campaign, and brand touchpoints
  • Help define how WorkOS shows up visually to technical and enterprise buyers


Requirements

  • Strong brand and web design portfolio
  • Experience designing for developer tools, SaaS, or technical audiences
  • Excellent visual craft and systems thinking
  • Ability to work independently in a remote environment across US and Canada
  • Clear communication and collaboration across cross-functional teams


Compensation
$150,000 – $185,000 per year plus equity (United States and Canada).


Location
Remote.
skills: Brand design,Web design,Visual systems,Marketing design,Developer audience

title: Senior Product Designer
description:
About the Company
Remote is a global HR platform solving modern organizations' biggest challenge: navigating global employment compliantly with ease. The company enables businesses of all sizes to recruit, pay, and manage international teams fully remotely.


About the Role
Remote is hiring a Senior Staff Product Designer to help build best-in-class HR platform experiences for a global, async, remote-first product organization.


Responsibilities

  • Design complex product experiences across Remote's global employment platform
  • Partner with product, engineering, and business stakeholders on high-impact initiatives
  • Contribute to design systems, patterns, and product quality at scale
  • Navigate ambiguity and deliver thoughtful solutions for global HR workflows
  • Help define the future of work through accessible, compliant product design


Requirements

  • Senior product design experience on complex B2B or platform products
  • Strong systems thinking and end-to-end design process
  • Excellent collaboration skills in a remote, async environment
  • Ability to simplify complex workflows for global users
  • Portfolio demonstrating impact on mature or scaling SaaS products


Location
Remote (AMER).
skills: Product design,UX systems,Cross-functional collaboration,Workflow design,Remote async work

title: Senior Product Designer
description:
About the Company
Weedmaps is a leading cannabis technology platform connecting consumers, retailers, and brands through a mobile-first, data-first marketplace and discovery experience.


About the Role
Weedmaps is hiring a Senior Product Designer to improve critical user journeys across web and native app experiences with research-backed, user-centered design.


Responsibilities

  • Identify, evaluate, and improve critical user journeys across Weedmaps products
  • Make quantitative and qualitative-informed design decisions for mobile-first experiences
  • Communicate design rationale through flows, wireframes, hi-fi comps, and prototypes
  • Align design work tightly with business needs and product goals
  • Contribute to a collaborative, research-backed design culture


Requirements

  • Deep understanding of user-centered design and mobile product design
  • Ability to communicate design decisions clearly in writing and presentations
  • Experience with research, testing, and data-informed design
  • Strong portfolio demonstrating web and native app product design
  • Senior-level ownership of complex product initiatives


Location
Remote (United States).

title: Product Designer
description:
About the Company
BetterHelp is the world's largest online therapy service, on a mission to remove traditional barriers to therapy and make mental health care more accessible. The platform connects millions of members with licensed therapists globally.


About the Role
BetterHelp is hiring a Product Designer for Core Platform to help expand access to therapy through thoughtful, user-centered product experiences.


Responsibilities

  • Design product experiences across BetterHelp's core platform
  • Collaborate with clinicians, engineers, product, and marketing teams
  • Contribute to accessible, user-centered flows that support mental health care
  • Balance business goals with member needs in a high-growth environment
  • Help shape product design quality across a mission-driven organization


Requirements

  • Product design experience with strong UX craft
  • Ability to collaborate across clinical, technical, and business stakeholders
  • User-centered design mindset with attention to accessibility
  • Comfort working in a remote, fast-scaling product organization
  • Portfolio demonstrating end-to-end product design impact


Location
Remote (United States).
keywords: Product Design,Mental Health,Tech for Good,Remote,Core Platform

title: Senior Product Designer
description:
About the Company
Hopper is a travel technology company building consumer and fintech products that help travelers book and manage trips with confidence.


About the Role
Hopper is hiring a Senior Product Designer for its Fintech team to design end-to-end web experiences and scale successful financial products across new sales channels.


Responsibilities

  • Design end-to-end web experiences from concept through launch
  • Conduct customer interviews and usability tests to validate design decisions
  • Use qualitative feedback and quantitative data to iterate on product experiences
  • Partner with product, engineering, and business stakeholders in a fast-scaling fintech team
  • Balance speed and quality while keeping customer experience at the center


Requirements

  • Senior product design experience, ideally in fintech or consumer web products
  • Ability to thrive in ambiguity and move quickly without sacrificing quality
  • Strong research, testing, and data-informed design skills
  • Excellent collaboration across product, engineering, and business teams
  • Portfolio demonstrating end-to-end web product design


Location
Remote (USA).
skills: Product design,User research,Usability testing,Web design,Cross-functional collaboration

title: Public Art Commission
description:
About the Company
Forecast Public Art is a nonprofit organization advancing public art practices that support justice, health, and human dignity. Forecast is facilitating the curation and commissioning process for permanent artworks at the new Westonka Library for Hennepin County Library.


About the Role
Artists and artist teams are invited to apply for two permanent public art commissions at the new Westonka Library in Mound, Minnesota, including an outdoor Commerce Porch sculpture opportunity and an interior mural opportunity.


Responsibilities

  • Submit qualifications for one of two public art opportunities at Westonka Library
  • Propose creative approaches for sculpture or mural work responsive to community context
  • Demonstrate ability to manage fabrication, installation, and community engagement
  • Participate in a multi-phase selection process if selected as a finalist
  • Create permanent artwork for a new net-zero library opening Spring 2027


Requirements

  • Mid-career or established artist or team based in Minnesota or eligible Native Nations
  • Experience with sculpture, mural, or large-scale public art at similar scale
  • Strong portfolio and record of commissions, projects, or exhibitions
  • Ability to submit a combined PDF via Submittable by the deadline
  • Teams and individuals may apply to one opportunity only


Compensation
Opportunity 1: $60,000 artist fee. Opportunity 2: $75,000 artist fee. Finalists receive $1,000 stipends for concept development.


Location
Mound, Minnesota, United States.

title: Media Art Award
description:
About the Company
The VH AWARD is a biennial global initiative hosted by Hyundai Motor Group supporting emerging media artists whose work engages with the cultural, historical, and emotional context of Asia.


About the Role
The 7th VH AWARD invites media artists worldwide to submit proposals for new audiovisual works exploring Asia-related contexts through video art, film, animation, games, or motion graphics.


Responsibilities

  • Submit a proposal for a new screen-based audiovisual artwork
  • Develop commissioned work if selected as one of five finalists
  • Participate in an online residency program with Ars Electronica if selected
  • Engage with themes connected to Asia's cultural, historical, and emotional context
  • Present commissioned work through international exhibition platforms from 2027 onward


Requirements

  • Media artists of Asian descent, based in Asia, or members of the Asian diaspora
  • Work in audiovisual art including video, film, animation, games, or motion graphics
  • Ability to submit required materials through the VH AWARD Entry Portal
  • Proposal suitable for single-channel video presentation
  • Open to individuals and collectives worldwide meeting eligibility criteria


Compensation
Five finalists each receive a $30,000 production grant. Grand Prix winner receives an additional $30,000 in 2027.


Location
United States applicants welcome; open call is global with Asia-context focus.
skills: Media art,Video art,Proposal writing,Audiovisual production,Artist grant application

title: Public Art
description:
About the Company
The City of Winston-Salem Public Art Commission supports public art projects that strengthen community connection and cultural vibrancy across Winston-Salem and Forsyth County, North Carolina.


About the Role
The Choice Neighborhoods Resident Artist project is a one-year residency inviting a socially engaged artist to collaborate with East Winston-Salem residents and the Public Art Commission on a community-focused artistic project.


Responsibilities

  • Collaborate with residents and the Public Art Commission on a community-focused art project
  • Complete immersion, proposal, and implementation phases over a 12-month residency
  • Manage an all-inclusive $300,000 project budget including artist services and implementation
  • Engage the community through socially engaged art practice
  • Deliver a residency project aligned with Choice Neighborhoods Initiative goals


Requirements

  • Socially engaged art practice with community collaboration experience
  • Experience managing project budgets of at least $50,000
  • Ability to commit to a 12-month residency timeline
  • Strong portfolio and qualifications suitable for a major public art residency
  • Application submitted via Submittable by the deadline


Compensation
$300,000 all-inclusive project budget, including $60,000 in artist services.


Location
Winston-Salem, North Carolina, United States.
skills: Social practice,Community engagement,Public art,Project management,Residency application

title: Vinyl Storefront Art
description:
About the Company
The City of Ontario Department of Museum, Arts & Culture advances regional history and art through museum exhibits, educational programs, annual arts festivals, and public art initiatives in Ontario, California.


About the Role
Artists are invited to submit applications through the City's Museum, Arts & Culture Submittable portal for public art opportunities, festival programming, and temporary public art projects in Ontario.


Responsibilities

  • Submit artist qualifications and project materials through the Submittable portal
  • Apply for eligible public art, festival, or temporary art opportunities as listed
  • Develop site-responsive or community-connected artwork for City of Ontario programs
  • Meet submission guidelines and deadlines for the selected opportunity
  • Participate in public art or festival projects supporting Ontario's cultural core


Requirements

  • Artist or artist team eligible to work in the United States
  • Experience with public art, festival, or community art projects preferred
  • Ability to submit through ontarioca.submittable.com
  • Portfolio demonstrating relevant artistic practice and project experience
  • Readiness to meet opportunity-specific eligibility and deadline requirements


Compensation
Compensation varies by opportunity; active calls include temporary public art and festival programs with paid artist selections.


Location
Ontario, California, United States.

title: Innovate Artist Grants
description:
About the Company
Innovate Grant supports artists and photographers through simple, quarterly grant cycles designed to spark creative development with minimal application friction.


About the Role
Innovate Grant's Spring cycle is open for visual artists and photographers to apply for a $1,800 unrestricted grant supporting new work and creative experimentation.


Responsibilities

  • Submit a streamlined grant application with images of your work
  • Apply in the Art or Photography category during the open Spring cycle
  • Use grant support to develop new ideas, experiment with forms, and create new work
  • Participate in a quarterly program awarding two $1,800 grants per cycle
  • Share work with an international community of grant-supported artists


Requirements

  • Applicants 18 years or older from around the world
  • Art category: painting, printmaking, drawing, sculpture, film/video, mixed media, installation, or new media
  • Photography category: portrait, conceptual, documentary, street, composite, collage, and related practices
  • Ability to submit name, email, category, work images, and application fee
  • Interest in unrestricted funding to support creative development


Compensation
$1,800 grant for one selected visual artist per quarter.


Location
United States.

title: The Evolution Grant
description:
About the Company
Art Fluent is an artist opportunity platform connecting visual artists with grants, exhibitions, and funding opportunities that support contemporary practice.


About the Role
The Evolution Grant provides $1,000 in funding for visual artists to support innovative project development through Art Fluent's open call program.


Responsibilities

  • Apply for the Evolution Grant visual artist funding opportunity
  • Submit project materials following the Evolution Grant prospectus guidelines
  • Use grant funding to advance a visual art project or new body of work
  • Participate in Art Fluent's grant program for contemporary artists
  • Meet application requirements and deadline for the current grant cycle


Requirements

  • Visual artists eligible under the Evolution Grant prospectus
  • Strong portfolio and project proposal suitable for grant review
  • Ability to complete application through Art Fluent's official process
  • Interest in funding to support project development and experimentation
  • Compliance with all submission guidelines and deadlines


Compensation
$1,000 grant for selected visual artist projects.


Location
United States.
skills: Grant writing,Visual art,Project proposal,Portfolio presentation,Contemporary art
